title: marketing — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-level channel for cross-provider marketing dashboards; provider-scoped channel for the per-provider health widget + circuit-breaker state indicator; dead-letter channel for the ops queue. Reverb driver (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.marketing
channels.description: Tenant-wide marketing activity stream. Sink for the marketing dashboard showing event capture + delivery lifecycle.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (marketing role OR admin OR owner)
channels.notes: Payload is trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Revenue values (value_amount_cents) are broadcast to admins + marketing role, redacted for support role.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.marketing.providers
channels.description: Provider-scoped health + config activity. Powers the per-provider status chip + circuit-breaker state indicator in the marketing dashboard.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (marketing role OR admin OR owner)
channels.notes: Config field NEVER broadcast (encrypted at rest; the channel does not decrypt). Only the fact-of-change is broadcast; the SDUI re-fetches to get updated (redacted) config view.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.marketing.dead-letters
channels.description: Dead-letter queue live updates. Powers the ops queue view showing new dead-letters + replay outcomes.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (marketing role OR admin OR owner)
channels.notes: Every MarketingDeadLetterCreated fires a companion push notification via the notifications module (cannot-opt-out). The channel is for the UI live-update; the notification is for the human alert.
